query:
-- Species
INSERT IGNORE INTO species (name, description) VALUES
('Sheep', 'Domestic sheep for breeding and fattening'),
('Goat', 'Domestic goat for breeding and fattening'),
('Cow', 'Cattle for dairy and beef production'),
('Buffalo', 'Buffalo for dairy and meat production'),
('Dog', 'Guard and working dogs');

-- Animal Categories
INSERT IGNORE INTO animal_categories (name, speciesId, idPrefix, targetWeightKg, expectedCycleDays) VALUES
('Lamb', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Sheep'), 'L-', 25.00, 90),
('Weaner', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Sheep'), 'W-', 35.00, 60),
('Fattening', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Sheep'), 'F-', 50.00, 120),
('Ewe', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Sheep'), 'E-', NULL, NULL),
('Ram', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Sheep'), 'R-', NULL, NULL),
('Goat', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Goat'), 'G-', 40.00, 120),
('Baby Goat', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Goat'), 'BG-', 20.00, 90),
('Billy Goat', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Goat'), 'BL-', NULL, NULL),
('Cow', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Cow'), 'C-', NULL, NULL),
('Beef Calf', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Cow'), 'BC-', 200.00, 180),
('Buffalo Calf', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Buffalo'), 'BF-', 200.00, 180),
('Dog', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Dog'), 'D-', NULL, NULL);

-- Animal Statuses
INSERT IGNORE INTO animal_statuses (name, description, isExitStatus) VALUES
('Active', 'Animal is on-farm and counted in daily costs', false),
('Sold', 'Animal has left via sale', true),
('Dead', 'Animal died on farm', true),
('Transported', 'Animal moved to another location', true),
('Lamb Stage', 'Newborn, pending registration', false),
('Weaner Stage', 'Post-weaning, pre-fattening', false),
('Fattening', 'In active fattening program', false),
('Breeding', 'Active breeding animal', false);

-- Groups / Pens
INSERT IGNORE INTO groups (groupCode, name, speciesId, description) VALUES
('F1', 'Fattening Pen 1', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Sheep'), 'Sheep fattening pen 1'),
('F2', 'Fattening Pen 2', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Sheep'), 'Sheep fattening pen 2'),
('F3', 'Fattening Pen 3', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Sheep'), 'Sheep fattening pen 3'),
('F4', 'Fattening Pen 4', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Sheep'), 'Sheep fattening pen 4'),
('F5', 'Fattening Pen 5', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Sheep'), 'Sheep fattening pen 5'),
('F6', 'Fattening Pen 6', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Sheep'), 'Sheep fattening pen 6'),
('B1', 'Breeding Unit A', NULL, 'Cattle and goat breeding unit A'),
('B2', 'Breeding Unit B', NULL, 'Cattle and goat breeding unit B'),
('Zone1', 'Guard Zone 1', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Dog'), 'Guard dog zone 1'),
('Zone2', 'Guard Zone 2', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Dog'), 'Guard dog zone 2'),
('Zone3', 'Guard Zone 3', (SELECT id FROM species WHERE name='Dog'), 'Guard dog zone 3');

-- Birth Types
INSERT IGNORE INTO birth_types (name, description) VALUES
('Single', 'One offspring born'),
('Twin', 'Two offspring born'),
('Triplet', 'Three offspring born'),
('Litter', 'Multiple offspring - count recorded separately');

-- Feed Items
INSERT IGNORE INTO feed_items (name, unit) VALUES
('Alfalfa', 'kg'),
('Alfalfa Hay', 'kg'),
('Milking Concentrate', 'kg'),
('Concentrate 16%', 'kg'),
('Concentrate 14%', 'kg'),
('Corn', 'kg'),
('Hay', 'kg'),
('Chicken Feed', 'kg');

-- Feed Item Price History (opening prices)
INSERT IGNORE INTO feed_item_price_history (feedItemId, effectiveDate, pricePerUnit, notes) VALUES
((SELECT id FROM feed_items WHERE name='Alfalfa'), '2025-01-01', 4.50, 'Opening price'),
((SELECT id FROM feed_items WHERE name='Alfalfa Hay'), '2025-01-01', 5.00, 'Opening price'),
((SELECT id FROM feed_items WHERE name='Milking Concentrate'), '2025-01-01', 12.00, 'Opening price'),
((SELECT id FROM feed_items WHERE name='Concentrate 16%'), '2025-01-01', 10.50, 'Opening price'),
((SELECT id FROM feed_items WHERE name='Concentrate 14%'), '2025-01-01', 9.50, 'Opening price'),
((SELECT id FROM feed_items WHERE name='Corn'), '2025-01-01', 6.00, 'Opening price'),
((SELECT id FROM feed_items WHERE name='Hay'), '2025-01-01', 3.50, 'Opening price'),
((SELECT id FROM feed_items WHERE name='Chicken Feed'), '2025-01-01', 8.00, 'Opening price');

-- Expense Categories
INSERT IGNORE INTO expense_categories (name, description) VALUES
('Vet', 'Veterinary services and treatments'),
('Vaccine', 'Vaccination costs'),
('Minerals', 'Mineral supplements'),
('Labor', 'Staff and labor costs'),
('Transport', 'Transportation costs'),
('Bedding', 'Bedding materials'),
('Repairs', 'Equipment and infrastructure repairs'),
('Electricity', 'Electricity costs'),
('Water', 'Water costs');

-- Expense Sub-categories
INSERT IGNORE INTO expense_sub_categories (categoryId, name) VALUES
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Vet'), 'Routine Checkup'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Vet'), 'Surgery'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Vet'), 'Emergency'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Vet'), 'Lab Tests'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Vaccine'), 'Mandatory'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Vaccine'), 'Seasonal'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Vaccine'), 'Treatment'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Labor'), 'Permanent Staff'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Labor'), 'Seasonal'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Labor'), 'Veterinary Labor'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Transport'), 'Feed Delivery'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Transport'), 'Animal Transport'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Transport'), 'Other'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Repairs'), 'Equipment'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Repairs'), 'Fencing'),
((SELECT id FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Repairs'), 'Infrastructure');

-- System Settings
INSERT IGNORE INTO system_settings (settingKey, settingValue, description) VALUES
('currency', 'EGP', 'Display currency'),
('fiscal_year_start', '1', 'Fiscal year start month (1=January)'),
('low_stock_threshold_days', '7', 'Days remaining that triggers LOW stock alert'),
('critical_stock_threshold_days', '3', 'Days remaining that triggers CRITICAL stock alert'),
('negative_pnl_threshold', '500', 'Loss amount per animal that triggers P&L warning (EGP)'),
('high_cost_day_threshold_pct', '20', 'Percentage above category average that triggers high cost alert'),
('income_statement_export_format', 'pdf', 'Default export format for income statement'),
('notifications_enabled', 'true', 'Enable in-app notifications'),
('whatsapp_alert_number', '', 'WhatsApp number for alerts'),
('hijri_calendar', 'false', 'Show Hijri calendar alongside Gregorian');
